summary: Iteration 12 testing complete - Visual mentorship editor with modules CRUD, PDF/DOCX export fully verified. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified including module cards, expand/collapse, PDF/DOCX buttons, 'Adicionar Modulo' button.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/mentorship/{id}/modules returns structured modules with lessons, exercises, materials
PUT /api/mentorship/{id}/modules saves full module structure with auto-generated IDs
POST /api/mentorship/{id}/modules adds new module with auto-generated ID and order
DELETE /api/mentorship/{id}/modules/{module_id} removes module and reorders remaining
POST /api/mentorship/{id}/parse-modules parses AI markdown content into structured modules using regex
GET /api/mentorship/{id}/export/pdf returns PDF file using WeasyPrint with proper Content-Type and Content-Disposition
GET /api/mentorship/{id}/export/docx returns DOCX file using python-docx with proper Content-Type and Content-Disposition
MentorshipEditor.js has ModuleCard component with expand/collapse functionality
LessonItem component has inline edit mode with save/cancel buttons
Export buttons correctly download files with mentorship title as filename
seed_data_creation: Existing mentorship 'd6d7cc5c-f342-4eb4-9d90-5b940118cde0' with 6 parsed modules used for testing. Test modules created during tests are cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 added visual mentorship editor features. Key endpoints: GET/PUT/POST/DELETE /api/mentorship/{id}/modules for modules CRUD, POST /api/mentorship/{id}/parse-modules to parse AI content, GET /api/mentorship/{id}/export/pdf and /export/docx for file exports. Frontend: MentorshipEditor.js with ModuleCard (expand/collapse), LessonItem (inline edit), export buttons (PDF/DOCX), 'Adicionar Modulo' button. Existing mentorship has 6 modules with lessons parsed from AI-generated content.

backend_api.POST /api/mentorship/{id}/modules: PASS - Adds new module with auto-generated ID
backend_api.POST /api/mentorship/{id}/parse-modules: PASS - Parses AI content into modules
backend_api.Authentication required: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without auth

frontend_ui.'Adicionar Modulo' button: PASS - Visible at bottom of modules list
frontend_ui.Lesson count: PASS - Shows '6 aulas' for each module
frontend_ui.Expand/collapse: PASS - Chevron icons toggle module content
frontend_ui.Edit/delete icons: PASS - Pencil and trash icons on modules

notes.pdf_export: Uses WeasyPrint to generate PDF from HTML template with styled modules and lessons
notes.docx_export: Uses python-docx to generate DOCX with headings, paragraphs, and page breaks
notes.parse_modules: Uses regex to split AI markdown content by module headers (## Modulo, **MODULO**, etc.)
notes.module_structure: Each module has: id, title, objective, order, lessons[], exercises[], materials[]
notes.lesson_structure: Each lesson has: id, title, content, duration, order
